description: Composition Rustic blue jeans made of a cotton and lycra blend fabric, has two insert pockets on the front with a patch pocket inside the right one, two patch pockets on the back with thread detailing and embroidered branding on the right pocket at the back, loops on the waist and has a metal zipper and button closure Fit Slim fit Mid rise Straight leg Wash care Turn inside out before washing and drying Machine wash cold separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or dry flat in shade Warm iron If you're a denim person, then this rustic blue jeans from wrangler is perfect for you. With a mid waist and great slim fit, this pair looks on trend and stays comfortable all day. Its straight leg style allows you to pair it with girly tops and heeled sandals or even slim fitting kurtis for that feminine touch. Model statistics The model wears trousers of length 39" Height: 5'8", Waist: 26", Hips: 36"
